title: Short Duas - Ramadan Month First night / eve

duas.mainTitle: 10 Duas for the first night of the month of Ramadan
duas.details: Duas on this page are for the First NIGHT / EVE (before the first day).
duas.title: 10 Duas for the first night of the month of Ramadan
Allahumma Rabba Shahr Ramadan
duas.description: It is recommended to say the following prayer that is reported from Imam Ja`far al-Sadiq (peace be upon him) as is mentioned in the book of al-Iqbal:

segments.translation: O Allah, the Lord of the month of Ramadan
and the Revealer of the Qur'an.
This is the month of Ramadan
in which You revealed the Qur'an

segments.arabic: وَأَنْزَلْتَ فِيهِ آيَاتٍ بَيِّنَاتٍ مِنَ ٱلْهُدَىٰ وَٱلْفُرْقَانِ
segments.transliteration: wa anzalta fihi ayatin bayyinatin min alhuda walfurqani
segments.translation: and revealed therein chapters of true guidance and distinction (between the right and the wrong).
O Allah, make us observe fast in its days
and remain awake in its nights to pray.
O Allah, let it be peaceful for us,
keep us in sound condition for it,

segments.arabic: وَتَسَلَّمْهُ مِنَّا فِي يُسْرٍ مِنْكَ وَمُعَافَاةٍ
segments.transliteration: wa tasallamhu minna fi yusrin minka wa mu`afatin
segments.translation: and receive it from us with easiness and wellbeing.
While taking decisions
from among Your inevitable decisions

segments.transliteration: wa fima tafruqu min al-amri alhakimi
segments.translation: and from among that which You decide from the wise affairs
at the Destiny Night

segments.arabic: مِنَ ٱلْقَضَاءِ ٱلَّذِي لاَ يُرَدُّ وَلاَ يُبَدَّلُ
segments.transliteration: min alqada'i alladhi la yuraddu wa la yubaddalu
segments.translation: from the act that is neither rejected nor altered,

segments.arabic: أَنْ تَكْتُبَنِي مِنْ حُجَّاجِ بَيْتِكَ ٱلْحَرَامِ
segments.transliteration: an taktubani min hujjaji baytika alharami
segments.translation: (please) write my name in the list of those pilgrims to Your Sacred House
whose pilgrimage receives Your approval,
whose efforts are appreciated,
whose sins are forgiven,
and whose wrongdoings are overlooked.
While making decisions and rendering possible things and events,
(please) grant me long lifetime
and my sustenance, making it from legal sources only.

duas.title: Yaman Yamleko dua after Maghrib Salaah
duas.description: After the Maghrib Prayer raise your hands and recite this supplication, as reported in ‘al-Iqbal’ from Imam Muhammad Jawad al-Taqi (peace be upon him):

segments.translation: O Allah Who controls the management of all affairs
and He has power over all things!
O He Who knows the stealth of looks,

segments.transliteration: wa ma tukhfi alssuduru wa tujinnu alddamiru
segments.translation: that which breasts conceal, and that which selves hide
and He is the Knower of subtle, the Aware!
O Allah, (please do) include us with those who intend and carried out their intentions,

segments.transliteration: wa la taj`alna mimman shaqiya fakasila
segments.translation: and do not include us with those who are unhappy due to their laziness

segments.arabic: وَلاَ مِمَّنْ هُوَ عَلَىٰ غَيْرِ عَمَلٍ يَتَّكِلُ
segments.transliteration: wa la mimman huwa `ala ghayri `amalin yattakilu
segments.translation: or with those who depend upon unreal hopes.
O Allah, (please do) cure our bodies from ailments

segments.arabic: وَأَعِنَّا عَلَىٰ مَا ٱفْتَرَضْتَ عَلَيْنَا مِنَ ٱلْعَمَلِ
segments.transliteration: wa a`inna `ala ma iftaradta `alayna min al`amali
segments.translation: and help us carry out the deeds You have made incumbent upon us to do

segments.arabic: حَتَّىٰ يَنْقَضِيَ عَنَّا شَهْرُكَ هٰذَا وَقَدْ أَدَّيْنَا مَفْرُوضَكَ فِيهِ عَلَيْنَا
segments.transliteration: hatta yanqadiya `anna shahruka hadha wa qad addayna mafrudaka fihi `alayna
segments.translation: so that when this month, which is Your month, elapses, we shall have carried out all the duties that You have made obligatory upon us to do.
O Allah, (please do) help us observe fasting in this month,
guide us to practice the acts of worship (perfectly),
grant us vigor to offer prayers,
do not preclude us from reciting (the Holy Qur'an),

segments.transliteration: wa sahhil lana fihi ita'a alzzakati
segments.translation: and make easy for us to give alms.

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ لاَ تُسَلِّطْ عَلَيْنَا وَصَباً وَلاَ تَعَباً
segments.transliteration: allahumma la tusallit `alayna wasaban wa la ta`aban
segments.translation: O Allah, (please) do not inflict us with fatigue, tiredness,
ailment, or injury.

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ ٱرْزُقْنَا ٱلإِفْطَارَ مِنْ رِزْقِكَ ٱلْحَلاَلِ
segments.transliteration: allahumma urzuqna al-iftara min rizqika alhalali
segments.translation: O Allah, (please do) grant us the food with which we break our fasting from Your sustenance that is legally gotten.

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ سَهِّلْ لَنَا فِيهِ مَا قَسَمْتَهُ مِنْ رِزْقِكَ
segments.transliteration: allahumma sahhil lana fihi ma qasamtahu min rizqika
segments.translation: O Allah, (please do) make easy for us the gaining of Your sustenance that You decide for us,

segments.transliteration: wa yassir ma qaddartahu min amrika
segments.translation: facilitate for us gaining that which You decide for us,

segments.arabic: وَٱجْعَلْهُ حَلاَلاً طَيِّباً نَقِيّاً مِنَ ٱلآثَامِ
segments.transliteration: waj`alhu halalan tayyiban naqiyyan min al-athami
segments.translation: and make it pure, empty of sins,
and free from offenses and flaws.

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ لاَ تُطْعِمْنَا إِلاَّ طَيِّباً غَيْرَ خَبِيثٍ وَلاَ حَرَامٍ
segments.transliteration: allahumma la tut`imna illa tayyiban ghayra khabithin wa la haramin
segments.translation: O Allah, (please) do not feed us except the good that is neither bad nor forbidden.

segments.arabic: وَٱجْعَلْ رِزْقَكَ لَنَا حَلاَلاً لاَ يَشُوبُهُ دَنَسٌ وَلاَ أَسْقَامٌ
segments.transliteration: waj`al rizqaka lana halalan la yashubuhu danasun wa la asqamun
segments.translation: (Please do) let the sustenance that You decide for us be legal, carrying neither filth nor diseases.

segments.arabic: يَا مَنْ عِلْمُهُ بِٱلسِّرِّ كَعِلْمِهِ بِٱلإِعْلاَنِ
segments.translation: O He Who knows the secret in the same was as He knows the public!
O He Who confers upon His servants with benevolence!

segments.arabic: يَا مَنْ هُوَ عَلَىٰ كُلِّ شَيْءٍ قَدِيرٌ
segments.transliteration: ya man huwa `ala kulli shay'in qadirun
segments.translation: O He Who has power over all things
and has acquaintance with all things!
(Please do) bestow upon us with (ceaseless) reference to You,
keep us away Your difficulty,
make us obtain Your ease,
guide us to the right path,
lead us to righteousness,
protect us against misfortunes,
and safeguard us against sins and faults.

segments.arabic: يَا مَنْ لاَ يَغْفِرُ عَظِيمَ ٱلذُّنُوبِ غَيْرُهُ
segments.transliteration: ya man la yaghfiru `azima aldhdhunubi ghayruhu
segments.translation: O He save Whom none forgives the grave sins

segments.transliteration: wa la yakshifu alssu'a illa huwa
segments.translation: and none can relieve from hardships!
O most Merciful of all those who show mercy
and most Generous of all those who show generosity!

segments.arabic: صَلِّ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَأَهْلِ بَيْتِهِ ٱلطَّيِّبِينَ
segments.transliteration: salli `ala muhammadin wa ahli baytihi alttayyibina
segments.translation: (Please do) send blessings to Muhammad and his Household the pure
and decide our fasting to be acceptable
and connected to piety and godliness.
Similarly, (please do) decide our efforts to be praiseworthy,
our acts of worship admissible,
our reciting of the Qur'an raised (to the heavens),
and our supplications responded.
(Please do) guide us to the most excellent way,
save us from difficulties,
facilitate for us the easy end,
elevate our ranks,
double the rewards for our good deeds,
accept our fasting and prayers,
react to our supplications,
forgive our sins,
overlook our wrongdoings,
make us of the successful worshippers,

segments.arabic: وَلاَ تَجْعَلْنَا مِنَ ٱلْمَغْضُوبِ عَلَيْهِمْ وَلاَ ٱلضَّالِّينَ
segments.transliteration: wa la taj`alna min almaghdubi `alayhim wa la alddallina
segments.translation: and do not include us with those who earn Your anger nor of those who go astray
so that when the month of Ramadan elapses,

segments.transliteration: wa qad qabilta fihi siyamana wa qiyamana
segments.translation: You shall have accepted our fasting and acts of worship,
blessed our deeds,
forgiven our sins,

segments.arabic: وَأَجْزَلْتَ فِيهِ مِنْ كُلِّ خَيْرٍ نَصِيبَنَا
segments.transliteration: wa ajzalta fihi min kulli khayrin nasibana
segments.translation: and doubled our shares from all good things.
Verily, You are the God Who responds,
the Lord Who is Nigh,
and You encompass all things.

duas.title: Allahumma Inna Hadha Shahr
duas.description: It is recommended to say the following supplication that is mentioned by Sayyid Ibn Tawus in Iqbal al-A`mal:

segments.translation: O Allah: This month of Ramadhan,
in which You revealed the Qur'an,

segments.arabic: هُدىً لِلنّاسِ وَبَيِّناتٍ مِنَ الْهُدى وَالْفُرْقَانِ
segments.transliteration: hudan lilnnasi wabayyinatin mina alhudi walfurqani
segments.translation: As guidance for people and clear proofs of true guidance and distinction (between the right and the wrong),
Has commenced.

segments.arabic: يا رَبِّ أعوذُ بِكَ فيهِ مِنَ الشَّيْطانِ الرَّجيمِ،
segments.transliteration: ya rabbi a`udhu bika fihi mina alshshaytani alrrajimi,
segments.translation: O Allah: in this month, I seek Your protection against Satan, the accursed,
And against his tricks and his ruses,
And his deception and his trickeries,
And his parties and his riding forces,
And his on foot forces and his evil inspirations,
And against straying off after being guided,
And against atheism after belief,
And against hypocrisy and showing off and felonies,
And against the evil of the whisperings of the slinking Devil,
Who whispers into the hearts of men;
From among the jinn and the men.
O Allah: and confer upon me with the fasting and the doing of acts of worship during this month,
And with the doing of acts of obedience to You,
And to Your Messenger and the Men in Authority,
May peace be upon him and them,
And the doing of whatever act that takes me near You,
And (please) take me away from acts of disobedience to You.
And confer upon me in this month with repentance, turning to You, and responding to Your instructions.

segments.arabic: وَأعِذْني فيهِ مِنَ الغيبَةِ وَالكَسَلِ وَالفَشَلِ،
segments.transliteration: wa'a`idhny fihi mina alghibaati waalkasali waalfashali,
segments.translation: And protect me in it against backbiting and lethargy and failure.
And respond my prayers in it.
And grant me well-being for my body and my intellect.

segments.arabic: وَفَرِّغْني فيهِ لِطاعَتِكَ وَما قَرَّبَ مِنكَ،
segments.transliteration: wafarrighny fihi lita`atika wama qarraba minka,
segments.translation: And grant me time to do acts of obedience to You as well as acts that take me near You.
O the All-generous; O the All-magnanimous.
O the All-generous:

segments.arabic: صَلِّ عَلى مُحَمَّدٍ وَعَلى أهْلِ بَيْتِ مُحَمَّدٍ
segments.transliteration: salli `ali muhammadin wa`ali ahli bayti muhammadin
segments.translation: (please) send blessings upon Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad,
Peace be upon him and them,
And do all that to us,
O the most Merciful of all those who show mercy.

duas.title: Allahumma Innahu Qad Dakhala
duas.description: According to a Hadith, the Holy Prophet (peace be upon him and his family) used to say this supplication at the beginning of Ramadan:

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنَّهُ قَدْ دَخَلَ شَهْرُ رَمَضَانَ
segments.transliteration: allahumma innahu qad dakhala shahru ramadana
segments.translation: O Allah, the month of Ramadan has begun.
O Allah, the Lord of the month of Ramadan
in which You have revealed the Qur'an

segments.transliteration: wa ja`altahu bayyinatin min alhuda walfurqani
segments.translation: making it guidance to people and clear proofs of the guidance and the distinction.

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ فَبَارِكْ لَنَا فِي شَهْرِ رَمَضَانَ
segments.transliteration: allahumma fabarik lana fi shahri ramadana
segments.translation: So, O Allah, please bless us in the month of Ramadan,
help us observe fasting and offer prayers in it,
and accept from us.

duas.title: Alhamdulilahil Lazee Akramna
duas.description: A According to a Hadith, the Holy Prophet (peace be upon him and his family) used to say this supplication at the beginning of Ramadhan month:

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنَّهُ قَدْ دَخَلَ شَهْرُ رَمَضَانَ
segments.transliteration: allahumma innahu qad dakhala shahru ramadana
segments.translation: O Allah, the month of Ramadan has begun.
O Allah, the Lord of the month of Ramadan
in which You have revealed the Qur'an

segments.transliteration: wa ja`altahu bayyinatin min alhuda walfurqani
segments.translation: making it guidance to people and clear proofs of the guidance and the distinction.

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ فَبَارِكْ لَنَا فِي شَهْرِ رَمَضَانَ
segments.transliteration: allahumma fabarik lana fi shahri ramadana
segments.translation: So, O Allah, please bless us in the month of Ramadan,
help us observe fasting and offer prayers in it,
and accept from us.

duas.title: Dua Hajj
duas.description: It has been narrated by Sayyid Ibn Tawus in ‘al-Iqbal’ that Imam al-sadiq (peace be upon him) used to say this supplication after the Maghrib (sunset) Prayers in Ramadan. In ‘al-Kafi’, al-Kulayni has narrated on the authority of Abu-Basir that Imam al-Sadiq (peace be upon him) used to say the following supplication in Ramadan:

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي بِكَ وَمِنْكَ أَطْلُبُ حَاجَتِي
segments.transliteration: allahumma inni bika wa minka atlubu hajati
segments.translation: O Allah, from You and by You, I beseech for settling my need.

segments.transliteration: wa man talaba hajatan ila alnnasi
segments.translation: If others beg people for settling their needs,

segments.arabic: فَإِنِّي لاَ أَطْلُبُ حَاجَتِي إِلاَّ مِنْكَ
segments.transliteration: fa-inni la atlubu hajati illa minka
segments.translation: I ask none except You for settling my need;
from You alone, since You have no partner with You.
I thus implore You in the name of Your favor and Your pleasure,

segments.arabic: أَنْ تُصَلِّيَ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَأَهْلِ بَيْتِهِ
segments.transliteration: an tusalliya `ala muhammadin wa ahli baytihi
segments.translation: to send blessings to Muhammad and his Household

segments.arabic: وَأَنْ تَجْعَلَ لِي فِي عَامِي هٰذَا إِلَىٰ بَيْتِكَ ٱلْحَرَامِ سَبِيلاً
segments.transliteration: wa an taj`ala li fi `ami hadha ila baytika alharami sabilan
segments.translation: and to choose for me a way to Your Holy House this year:
a pilgrimage that is admitted,
accepted, pure,
and sincerely intended for You
by which You delight me
and raise my rank with You.
Confer upon me with the grace of making me cast my sight down (against what is illegal for me to look at),
making me act chastely,

segments.arabic: وَأَنْ أَكُفَّ بِهَا عَنْ جَمِيعِ مَحَارِمِكَ
segments.transliteration: wa an akuffa biha `an jami`i maharimika
segments.translation: and making me stop committing any deed that You have deemed unlawful

segments.arabic: حَتَّىٰ لاَ يَكُونَ شَيْءٌ آثَرَ عِنْدِي مِنْ طَاعَتِكَ وَخَشْيَتِكَ
segments.transliteration: hatta la yakuna shay`un athara `indi min ta`atika wa khashyatika
segments.translation: so that nothing will be more preferred in my sight than obedience to You, fear of You,
doing all that which You love,
and avoiding all that which You have detested and warned against.

segments.transliteration: waj`al dhalika fi yusrin wa yasarin
segments.translation: (Please) make all that take place with easiness, lenience,
and good health as well as the grace that You have bestowed upon me.

segments.arabic: وَأَسْأَلُكَ أَنْ تَجْعَلَ وَفَاتِي قَتْلاً فِي سَبِيلِكَ
segments.transliteration: wa as'aluka an taj`ala wafati qatlan fi sabilika
segments.translation: I beseech You to cause me to die as martyr for Your sake,
under the pennon of Your Prophet and in the line of Your intimate servants.

segments.arabic: وَأَسْأَلُكَ أَنْ تَقْتُلَ بِي أَعْدَاءَكَ وَأَعْدَاءَ رَسُولِكَ
segments.transliteration: wa as'aluka an taqtula bi a`da'aka wa a`da'a rasulika
segments.translation: I ask You to make me a means of killing Your enemies and the enemies of Your Messenger.

segments.arabic: وَأَسْأَلُكَ أَنْ تُكْرِمَنِي بِهَوَانِ مَنْ شِئْتَ مِنْ خَلْقِكَ
segments.transliteration: wa as'aluka an tukrimani bihawani man shi'ta min khalqika
segments.translation: I ask You to honor me through humiliating any one of Your created beings that You choose,

segments.arabic: وَلاَ تُهِنِّي بِكَرَامَةِ أَحَدٍ مِنْ أَوْلِيَائِكَ
segments.transliteration: wa la tuhinni bikaramati ahadin min awliya'ika
segments.translation: and not to humiliate me through honoring any of Your intimate servants.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ ٱجْعَلْ لِي مَعَ ٱلرَّسُولِ سَبِيلاً
segments.transliteration: allahumma ij`al li ma`a alrrasuli sabilan
segments.translation: O Allah, find me a way with the Messenger.
Allah is Sufficient unto me! Only that which Allah wants shall take place.

duas.title: Iqbal Aamal - Dua 2
duas.description: The following supplication has been narrated in various ways including what we read in Man La Yahzaruh Al-Faqih by Ibn Babuyih as follows. It has been narrated on the authority of Imam Musa ibn Ja‟far (as): “Recite these supplications at the beginning of the new year in the month of Ramadhan. Whoever recites these supplications with sincere intentions shall not suffer from any chaos or harm in his religion, worldly affairs or health and God would protect him

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ بِاسْمِكَ الَّذِي دَانَ لَهُ كُلُّ شَيْ‌ءٍ
segments.transliteration: Allahumma inni as'aluka bismikalladhi dana lahu kullu shay'
segments.translation: O Allah, I ask You by Your Name, to which everything is subservient.

segments.arabic: وَ بِرَحْمَتِكَ الَّتِي وَسِعَتْ كُلَّ شَيْ‌ءٍ
segments.translation: And by Your mercy that encompasses all things.

segments.arabic: وَ بِعِزَّتِكَ الَّتِي قَهَرَتْ كُلَّ شَيْ‌ءٍ
segments.translation: And by Your might that overwhelms all things.

segments.arabic: وَ بِعَظَمَتِكَ الَّتِي تَوَاضَعَ لَهَا كُلُّ شَيْ‌ءٍ
segments.transliteration: Wa bi'azamatikallati tawada'a laha kullu shay'
segments.translation: And by Your greatness to which all things humble themselves.

segments.arabic: وَ بِقُوَّتِكَ الَّتِي خَضَعَ لَهَا كُلُّ شَيْ‌ءٍ
segments.transliteration: Wa biquwwatikallati khada'a laha kullu shay'
segments.translation: And by Your power to which all things submit.

segments.arabic: وَ بِجَبَرُوتِكَ الَّتِي غَلَبَتْ كُلَّ شَيْ‌ءٍ
segments.translation: And by Your omnipotence that overcomes all things.

segments.arabic: وَ بِعِلْمِكَ الَّذِي‌ أَحاطَ بِكُلِّ شَيْ‌ءٍ
segments.translation: And by Your knowledge that encompasses all things.
O Light, O Holy.
O First, before all things.

segments.arabic: وَ يَا بَاقِي بَعْدَ كُلِّ شَيْ‌ءٍ
segments.transliteration: Wa Ya Baqi ba'da kulli shay'
segments.translation: And O Last, after all things.
O Allah, O Most Gracious.

segments.arabic: صَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِ مُحَمَّدٍ
segments.transliteration: Salli ala Muhammadin wa ali Muhammad
segments.translation: Send blessings upon Muhammad and the family of Muhammad.

segments.arabic: وَ اغْفِرْ لِيَ الذُّنُوبَ الَّتِي تُغَيِّرُ النِّعَمَ
segments.translation: And forgive me the sins that change blessings.

segments.arabic: وَ اغْفِرْ لِيَ الذُّنُوبَ الَّتِي تُنْزِلُ النِّقَمَ
segments.translation: And forgive me the sins that bring down calamities.

segments.arabic: وَ اغْفِرْ لِيَ الذُّنُوبَ الَّتِي تَقْطَعُ الرَّجَاءَ
segments.translation: And forgive me the sins that cut off hope.

segments.arabic: وَ اغْفِرْ لِيَ الذُّنُوبَ الَّتِي تُدِيلُ الْأَعْدَاءَ
segments.translation: And forgive me the sins that empower enemies.

segments.arabic: وَ اغْفِرْ لِيَ الذُّنُوبَ الَّتِي تَرُدُّ الدُّعَاءَ
segments.translation: And forgive me the sins that repel supplication.

segments.arabic: وَ اغْفِرْ لِيَ الذُّنُوبَ الَّتِي تُنْزِلُ الْبَلَاءَ
segments.translation: And forgive me the sins that bring down affliction.

segments.arabic: وَ اغْفِرْ لِيَ الذُّنُوبَ الَّتِي تَحْبِسُ غَيْثَ السَّمَاءِ
segments.translation: And forgive me the sins that withhold the rain of the sky.

segments.arabic: وَ اغْفِرْ لِيَ الذُّنُوبَ الَّتِي تَكْشِفُ الْغِطَاءَ
segments.translation: And forgive me the sins that remove the covering.

segments.arabic: وَ اغْفِرْ لِيَ الذُّنُوبَ الَّتِي تُعَجِّلُ الْفَنَاءَ
segments.translation: And forgive me the sins that hasten destruction.

segments.arabic: وَ اغْفِرْ لِيَ الذُّنُوبَ الَّتِي تُورِثُ النَّدَمَ
segments.translation: And forgive me the sins that bring about regret.

segments.arabic: وَ اغْفِرْ لِيَ الذُّنُوبَ الَّتِي تَهْتِكُ الْعِصَمَ
segments.translation: And forgive me the sins that violate inviolability.

segments.arabic: وَ أَلْبِسْنِي دِرْعَكَ الْحَصِينَةَ الَّتِي لَا تُرَامُ
segments.translation: And clothe me in Your fortified armor that cannot be reached.

segments.arabic: وَ عَافِنِي مِنْ شَرِّ مَا أَخَافُ بِاللَّيْلِ وَ النَّهَارِ
segments.transliteration: Wa 'afini min sharri ma akhafu billayli wan-nahar
segments.translation: And protect me from the evil of what I fear by night and by day.
In the coming of this year.
O Allah, Lord of the seven heavens.

segments.arabic: وَ رَبَّ الْأَرَضِينَ السَّبْعِ وَ مَا فِيهِنَّ
segments.translation: And Lord of the seven earths and what is in them.

segments.arabic: وَ مَا بَيْنَهُنَّ وَ رَبَّ الْعَرْشِ الْعَظِيمِ
segments.translation: And what is between them, and Lord of the Great Throne.

segments.arabic: وَ رَبَّ السَّبْعِ الْمَثَانِي وَ الْقُرْآنِ الْعَظِيمِ
segments.translation: And Lord of the seven repeated verses and the Great Quran.

segments.arabic: وَ رَبَّ إِسْرَافِيلَ وَ مِيكَائِيلَ وَ جَبْرَئِيلَ
segments.transliteration: Wa rabba Israfila wa Mika'ila wa Jabra'il
segments.translation: And Lord of Israfil, Mika'il, and Jibril.

segments.arabic: وَ رَبَّ مُحَمَّدٍ خَاتَمِ النَّبِيِّينَ وَ سَيِّدِ الْمُرْسَلِينَ
segments.transliteration: Wa rabba Muhammadin khatamin-nabiyyina wa sayyidil-mursalin
segments.translation: And Lord of Muhammad, the Seal of the Prophets and the Master of Messengers.

segments.arabic: أَسْأَلُكَ بِكَ وَ بِمَا تَسَمَّيْتَ بِهِ
segments.transliteration: As'aluka bika wa bima tasammayta bihi
segments.translation: I ask You by You and by what You have named Yourself.

segments.arabic: يَا عَظِيمُ أَنْتَ الَّذِي تَمُنُّ بِالْعَظِيمِ
segments.translation: O Great One, You are the One who bestows the great.
And You repel every danger.
And You give every generous gift.

segments.arabic: وَ تُضَاعِفُ مِنَ الْحَسَنَاتِ الْكَثِيرِ بِالْقَلِيلِ
segments.translation: And You multiply good deeds, the many from the few.
And You do what You will.

segments.arabic: يَا قَدِيرُ يَا اللَّهُ يَا رَحْمَانُ
segments.transliteration: Ya Qadiru Ya Allahu Ya Rahman
segments.translation: O Powerful, O Allah, O Most Gracious.

segments.arabic: صَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِ مُحَمَّدٍ
segments.transliteration: Salli ala Muhammadin wa ali Muhammad
segments.translation: Send blessings upon Muhammad and the family of Muhammad.

segments.arabic: وَ أَلْبِسْنِي فِي مُسْتَقْبَلِ سَنَتِي هَذِهِ سِتْرَكَ
segments.transliteration: Wa albisni fi mustaqbali sanati hadhihi sitrak
segments.translation: And clothe me in the coming of this year with Your cover.
And illuminate my face with Your light.
And make me beloved with Your love.

segments.arabic: وَ بَلِّغْ بِي رِضْوَانَكَ وَ شَرِيفَ كَرَائِمِكَ
segments.transliteration: Wa balligh bi ridwanaka wa sharifa kara'imik
segments.translation: And cause me to reach Your pleasure and noble bounties.

segments.arabic: وَ جَزِيلَ عَطَائِكَ مِنْ خَيْرِ مَا عِنْدَكَ
segments.translation: And abundant gifts from the best of what You have.

segments.arabic: وَ مِنْ خَيْرِ مَا أَنْتَ مُعْطِيهِ أَحَداً مِنْ خَلْقِكَ
segments.transliteration: Wa min khayri ma anta mu'tihi ahadan min khalqik
segments.translation: And from the best of what You give to anyone of Your creation.

segments.arabic: سِوَى مَنْ لَا يَعْدِلُهُ عِنْدَكَ أَحَدٌ فِي الدُّنْيَا وَ الْآخِرَةِ
segments.transliteration: Siwa man la ya'diluhu 'indaka ahadun fid-dunya wal-akhirah
segments.translation: Except one whom no one equals in Your sight in this world and the Hereafter.
And clothe me with that, Your protection.
O Place of every complaint.
And O Witness of every secret discourse.
And O Knower of every hidden thing.

segments.arabic: وَ يَا دَافِعَ مَا تَشَاءُ مِنْ بَلِيَّةٍ
segments.transliteration: Wa ya dafi'a ma tasha'u min baliyyah
segments.translation: And O Repeller of whatever You will of affliction.

segments.arabic: يَا كَرِيمَ الْعَفْوِ يَا حَسَنَ التَّجَاوُزِ
segments.translation: O Generous in pardon, O Beautiful in overlooking.

segments.arabic: تَوَفَّنِي عَلَى مِلَّةِ إِبْرَاهِيمَ وَ فِطْرَتِهِ
segments.translation: Take me in death upon the religion of Abraham and his natural disposition.

segments.arabic: وَ عَلَى دِينِ مُحَمَّدٍ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَ آلِهِ وَ سُنَّتِهِ
segments.transliteration: Wa 'ala dini Muhammadin salla Allahu 'alayhi wa alihi wa sunnatihi
segments.translation: And upon the religion of Muhammad, may Allah bless him and his family, and his tradition.
And upon the best of deaths.
So take me in death as a friend to Your allies.
And an enemy to Your enemies.

segments.arabic: 16 اللَّهُمَّ وَ امْنَعْنِي مِنْ كُلِّ عَمَلٍ أَوْ فِعْلٍ أَوْ قَوْلٍ يُبَاعِدُنِي مِنْكَ
segments.transliteration: Allahumma wamna'ni min kulli 'amalin aw fi'lin aw qawlin yuba'iduni mink
segments.translation: O Allah, prevent me from every deed, action, or word that distances me from You.

segments.arabic: وَ اجْلِبْنِي إِلَى كُلِّ عَمَلٍ أَوْ فِعْلٍ أَوْ قَوْلٍ يُقَرِّبُنِي مِنْكَ
segments.transliteration: Wajlibni ila kulli 'amalin aw fi'lin aw qawlin yuqarribuni mink
segments.translation: And draw me to every deed, action, or word that brings me closer to You.

segments.arabic: فِي هَذِهِ السَّنَةِ يَا أَرْحَمَ الرَّاحِمِينَ
segments.translation: In this year, O Most Merciful of the merciful.

segments.arabic: وَ امْنَعْنِي مِنْ كُلِّ عَمَلٍ أَوْ فِعْلٍ أَوْ قَوْلٍ يَكُونُ مِنِّي
segments.transliteration: Wamna'ni min kulli 'amalin aw fi'lin aw qawlin yakunu minni
segments.translation: And prevent me from every deed, action, or word that comes from me.
I fear its bad consequence.
And I fear Your displeasure with me for it.

segments.arabic: حِذَارَ أَنْ تَصْرِفَ وَجْهَكَ الْكَرِيمَ عَنِّي
segments.translation: For fear that You turn Your noble face away from me.

segments.arabic: فَأَسْتَوْجِبَ بِهِ نَقْصاً مِنْ حَظٍّ لِي عِنْدَكَ
segments.transliteration: Fa'astawjiba bihi naqsan min hazzin li 'indak
segments.translation: So I deserve a decrease in my portion with You.
O Kind, O Merciful.

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ اجْعَلْنِي فِي مُسْتَقْبَلِ هَذِهِ السَّنَةِ فِي حِفْظِكَ
segments.transliteration: Allahummaj'alni fi mustaqbali hadhihi-ssanati fi hifzik
segments.translation: O Allah, make me in the coming of this year in Your protection.
And Your neighborhood, and Your shelter.
And envelop me in Your well-being.
And grant me Your generosity.
Your neighbor is mighty, and Your praise is sublime.
And there is no god but You.

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ اجْعَلْنِي تَابِعاً لِصَالِحِي مَنْ مَضَى مِنْ أَوْلِيَائِكَ
segments.transliteration: Allahummaj'alni tabi'an lisalihi man mada min awliya'ik
segments.translation: O Allah, make me a follower of the righteous of those who have passed on from Your allies.
And join me with them.

segments.arabic: وَ اجْعَلْنِي مُسَلِّماً لِمَنْ قَالَ بِالصِّدْقِ عَلَيْكَ مِنْهُمْ
segments.transliteration: Waj'alni musliman liman qala bis-sidqi 'alayka minhum
segments.translation: And make me one who submits to those who spoke the truth about You from among them.
And I seek refuge in You.

segments.arabic: يَا إِلَهِي أَنْ تُحِيطَ بِي خَطِيئَتِي وَ ظُلْمِي
segments.transliteration: Ya ilahi an tuhita bi khati'ati wa zulmi
segments.translation: O my God, from my sin and injustice encompassing me.
And my excess against myself.
And my following of my desires.
And my preoccupation with my passions.

segments.arabic: فَيَحُولَ ذَلِكَ بَيْنِي وَ بَيْنَ رَحْمَتِكَ وَ رِضْوَانِكَ
segments.transliteration: Fayahula dhalika bayni wa bayna rahmatika wa ridwanik
segments.translation: So that prevents me from Your mercy and Your pleasure.
So I am forgotten by You.
Exposed to Your anger and Your vengeance.

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ وَفِّقْنِي لِكُلِّ عَمَلٍ صَالِحٍ تَرْضَى بِهِ عَنِّي
segments.transliteration: Allahumma waffiqni likulli 'amalin salihin tarda bihi 'anni
segments.translation: O Allah, grant me success in every righteous deed that pleases You.
And draw me near to You.

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ كَمَا كَفَيْتَ نَبِيَّكَ مُحَمَّداً صَلَوَاتُكَ عَلَيْهِ وَ آلِهِ هَوْلَ عَدُوِّهِ
segments.transliteration: Allahumma kama kafayta nabiyyaka Muhammadan salawatuka 'alayhi wa alihi hawla 'aduwwih
segments.translation: O Allah, as You sufficed Your Prophet Muhammad, Your blessings be upon him and his family, against the terror of his enemy.

segments.arabic: وَ فَرَّجْتَ هَمَّهُ وَ كَشَفْتَ كَرْبَهُ
segments.transliteration: Wa farrajta hammahu wa kashafta karbah
segments.translation: And You relieved his distress and removed his hardship.

segments.arabic: وَ صَدَقْتَهُ وَعْدَكَ وَ أَنْجَزْتَ لَهُ عَهْدَكَ
segments.transliteration: Wa sadaqtahu wa'daka wa anjazta lahu 'ahdak
segments.translation: And You fulfilled Your promise to him and accomplished Your covenant for him.

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ فَبِذَلِكَ فَاكْفِنِي هَوْلَ هَذِهِ السَّنَةِ وَ آفَاتَهَا
segments.transliteration: Allahumma bi dhalika fakfini hawla hadhihi-ssanati wa afatiha
segments.translation: O Allah, by that, suffice me against the terror of this year and its afflictions.
And its diseases and its trials.
And its evils and its sorrows.
And the difficulty of livelihood in it.
And cause me to reach, by Your mercy, the perfection of well-being.

segments.arabic: بِتَمَامِ دَوَامِ النِّعْمَةِ عِنْدِي إِلَى مُنْتَهَى أَجَلِي
segments.translation: With the completion of the continuation of blessing with me until the end of my term.

segments.arabic: أَسْأَلُكَ سُؤَالَ مَنْ أَسَاءَ وَ ظَلَمَ
segments.transliteration: As'aluka su'ala man asa'a wa zalam
segments.translation: I ask You with the asking of one who has done evil and wronged.
And submitted and confessed.

segments.arabic: أَنْ تَغْفِرَ لِي مَا مَضَى مِنَ الذُّنُوبِ
segments.transliteration: An taghfira li ma mada minadh-dhunub
segments.translation: That You forgive me what has passed of sins.
Which Your guardians have recorded.
And Your noble angels have counted against me.
And that You protect me.
O Allah, O Most Gracious.

segments.arabic: صَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَ أَهْلِ بَيْتِ مُحَمَّدٍ
segments.transliteration: Salli ala Muhammadin wa ahli bayti Muhammad
segments.translation: Send blessings upon Muhammad and the family of Muhammad.
And grant me all that I have asked You.
And desired from You.

segments.arabic: فَإِنَّكَ أَمَرْتَنِي بِالدُّعَاءِ وَ تَكَفَّلْتَ بِالْإِجَابَةِ
segments.transliteration: Fa'innaka amartani bid-du'a'i wa takaffalta bil-ijabah
segments.translation: For You have commanded me to supplicate and guaranteed a response.
O Most Merciful of the merciful.

duas.title: Syed Baqi Dua
duas.description: "Another supplication for the first day of it [the month], from Misbah by al-Sayyid ibn Baqi, may Allah have mercy on him."

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ يَا مَنْ‌ لَيْسَ كَمِثْلِهِ شَيْ‌ءٌ وَ
segments.transliteration: Allahumma inni as'aluka ya man laysa kamithlihi shay'un wa
segments.translation: O Allah, I ask You, O He to whom there is no comparable,

segments.arabic: يَا مَنْ لَيْسَ فِي السَّمَاوَاتِ الْعُلَى وَ لَا فِي الْأَرَضِينَ السُّفْلَى
segments.transliteration: ya man laysa fis-samawatil-'ula wa la fil-aradin-as-sufla
segments.translation: and O He who is not in the high heavens nor in the lower earths,

segments.arabic: وَ لَا فَوْقَهُنَّ وَ لَا تَحْتَهُنَّ وَ لَا بَيْنَهُنَّ
segments.transliteration: wa la fawqahunna wa la tahtahunna wa la baynahunna
segments.translation: nor above them, nor below them, nor between them,

segments.arabic: إِلَهٌ يُعْبَدُ غَيْرُكَ وَحْدَكَ لَا شَرِيكَ لَكَ
segments.transliteration: ilahun yu'badu ghayruka wahdaka la sharika lak
segments.translation: there is no deity worshipped other than You alone, no partner to You.

segments.arabic: يَا وَاحِدُ بِغَيْرِ تَشْبِيهٍ يَا بَاقِياً إِلَى غَيْرِ غَايَةٍ
segments.transliteration: ya wahidu bighayri tashbihin ya baqiyan ila ghayri ghayatin
segments.translation: O Unique without comparison, O Everlasting without end,

segments.arabic: يَا جَبَّاراً فِي سُلْطَانِهِ يَا كَبِيراً فِي كِبْرِيَائِهِ
segments.transliteration: ya jabbaran fi sultanihi ya kabiran fi kibriya'ihi
segments.translation: O Dominant in His sovereignty, O Great in His majesty,

segments.arabic: يَا قُدُّوساً فِي سَمَائِهِ [فِي أَسْمَائِهِ‌] يَا كَرِيماً فِي عَطَائِهِ
segments.transliteration: ya quddusan fi sama'ihi [fi asma'ihi] ya kariman fi 'ata'ihi
segments.translation: O Holy in His heaven [in His names], O Generous in His giving,

segments.arabic: يَا جَلِيلًا فِي بَهَائِهِ يَا حَمِيداً فِي فَعَالِهِ
segments.transliteration: ya jalilan fi baha'ihi ya hamidan fi fa'alihi
segments.translation: O Majestic in His splendor, O Praiseworthy in His deeds,

segments.arabic: يَا مَلِكاً فِي ابْتِدَائِهِ وَ اقْتِدَارِهِ يَا عَالِماً فِي إِحْصَائِهِ
segments.transliteration: ya malikan fib-tida'ihi waq-tidarihi ya 'aliman fi ihsa'ihi
segments.translation: O King in His initiation and power, O Knower in His account,

segments.arabic: يَا غَالِباً فِي ارْتِفَاعِهِ يَا عَزِيزاً فِي امْتِنَاعِهِ
segments.translation: O Dominant in His ascendancy, O Mighty in His prevention,

segments.arabic: يَا جَوَاداً فِي إِفْضَالِهِ يَا ذَا السُّلْطَانِ الشَّامِخِ
segments.transliteration: ya jawadan fi ifdalihi ya dhas-sultan-ish-shamikh
segments.translation: O Generous in His favor, O Possessor of the lofty sovereignty,

segments.arabic: يَا ذَا الْعِزِّ الْبَاذِخِ يَا ذَا الْمُلْكِ الْفَاخِرِ
segments.translation: O Possessor of the lavish dignity, O Possessor of the glorious kingdom,

segments.arabic: يَا ذَا الْبَهَاءِ الزَّاهِرِيَا مَنْ بِهِ يُحَسَّنُ الظُّنُونُ
segments.transliteration: ya dhal-baha'iz-zahiri ya man bihi yuhassinuz-zunun
segments.translation: O Possessor of the radiant splendor, O He through whom good assumptions are made,

segments.arabic: يَا ذَا الْجُودِ وَ الْكَرَمِ وَ الْمَنِّ وَ الْكِبْرِيَاءِ يَا بَاقِياً لَا يَمُوتُ
segments.transliteration: ya dhal-judi wal-karami wal-manni wal-kibriya'i ya baqiyan la yamut
segments.translation: O Possessor of generosity, nobility, favor, and grandeur, O Everlasting who does not die,

segments.arabic: يَا صَمَداً لَا يَطْعَمُ يَا قَيُّوماً لَا يَنَامُ
segments.transliteration: ya samadan la yat'amu ya qayyuman la yanam
segments.translation: O Eternal who does not eat, O Sustainer who does not sleep,

segments.arabic: يَا بَصِيراً لَا يَرْتَابُ يَا حَافِظاً لَا يَجْهَلُ
segments.transliteration: ya basiran la yartabu ya hafizan la yajhalu
segments.translation: O Seeing who does not doubt, O Guardian who does not ignore,

segments.arabic: يَا وَاسِعاً لَا يُتَكَلَّفُ يَا غَنِيّاً لَا يَفْتَقِرُ
segments.transliteration: ya wasi'an la yutakallafu ya ghaniyan la yaftaqiru
segments.translation: O Expansive who does not exert, O Wealthy who does not need,

segments.arabic: يَا مَنِيعاً لَا يُرَامُ يَا عَزِيزاً لَا يُضَامُ
segments.transliteration: ya mani'an la yuramu ya 'azizan la yudamu
segments.translation: O Impregnable who cannot be attacked, O Mighty who is not wronged,

segments.arabic: يَا قَوِيّاً لَا يُغْلَبُ يَا جَبَّاراً لَا يُكَلَّمُ
segments.transliteration: ya qawiyan la yughlabu ya jabbaran la yukallamu
segments.translation: O Strong who is not overcome, O Compeller who is not spoken to,

segments.arabic: يَا مُحْتَجِباً لَا يُرَى يَا جَبَّارَ السَّمَاوَاتِ وَ الْأَرْضِ
segments.transliteration: ya muhtajiban la yura ya jabbaras-samawati wal-ard
segments.translation: O Hidden who is not seen, O Compeller of the heavens and the earth,

segments.arabic: يَا نُورَ السَّمَاوَاتِ وَ الْأَرْضِ يَا بَدِيعَ السَّمَاوَاتِ وَ الْأَرْضِ
segments.transliteration: ya nuras-samawati wal-ard ya badi'as-samawati wal-ard
segments.translation: O Light of the heavens and the earth, O Originator of the heavens and the earth,

segments.arabic: يَا أَكْرَمَ الْأَكْرَمِينَ يَا أَجْوَدَ الْأَجْوَدَيْنِ
segments.translation: O Most Generous of the generous, O Most Giving of the givers,

segments.arabic: يَا أَرْحَمَ الرَّاحِمِينَ يَا غِيَاثَ الْمُسْتَغِيثِينَ
segments.translation: O Most Merciful of the merciful, O Relief of those seeking relief,

segments.arabic: يَا وَلِيَّ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ يَا عِزَّ النَّاصِرِينَ وَ الذَّاكِرِينَ
segments.translation: O Guardian of the believers, O Honor of those giving victory and those remembering,

segments.arabic: يَا سَبِيلَ الصَّالِحِينَ يَا مُفَرِّجاً عَنِ الْمَكْرُوبِينَ
segments.translation: O Way of the righteous, O Reliever of the distressed,

segments.arabic: يَا كَثِيرَ الرَّاغِبِينَ إِلَيْهِ يَا غَوْثَ الْمَلْهُوفِينَ
segments.translation: O Abundantly sought after, O Refuge of the distraught,
O Best of those called upon.

segments.arabic: أَسْأَلُكَ أَنْ تُصَلِّيَ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِ مُحَمَّدٍ
segments.transliteration: as'aluka an tusalliya 'ala muhammadin wa ali muhammad
segments.translation: I ask You to send blessings upon Muhammad and the family of Muhammad

segments.arabic: وَ أَنْ تَجْعَلَ عَبْدَكَ مِنْ أَعْظَمِ عِبَادِكَ الْيَوْمَ فِيمَا تَقْسِمُهُ مِنْ نُورٍ تَهْدِي بِهِ
segments.transliteration: wa an taj'ala 'abdaka min a'zami 'ibadikal-yawma fima taqsimuhu min nurin tahdi bih
segments.translation: and to make Your servant among the greatest of Your servants today in what You distribute of light by which You guide,

segments.arabic: وَ رَحْمَةٍ تَنْشُرُهَا وَ رِزْقٍ تَبْسُطُهُ
segments.transliteration: wa rahmatin tanshuruha wa rizqin tabsutuh
segments.translation: and mercy which You spread, and provision You extend,

segments.arabic: وَ ضُرٍّ تَكْشِفُهُ وَ بَلَاءٍ تَصْرِفُهُ
segments.transliteration: wa durrin takshifuhu wa bala'in tasrifuh
segments.translation: and harm You unveil, and affliction You avert,

segments.arabic: وَ فِتْنَةٍ تَكُفُّهَا وَ ثَوَابٍ تَكْتُبُهُ وَ أَمْرٍ تُسَهِّلُهُ‌
segments.transliteration: wa fitnatin takuffuha wa thawabin taktubuhu wa amrin tusahhiluh
segments.translation: and temptation You prevent, and reward You write, and matter You facilitate.

segments.arabic: إِنَّكَ عَلى‌ كُلِّ شَيْ‌ءٍ قَدِيرٌ يَا أَرْحَمَ الرَّاحِمِينَ.
segments.transliteration: innaka 'ala kulli shay'in qadirun ya arhamar-rahimin.
segments.translation: Indeed, You are over all things competent, O Most Merciful of the merciful.

duas.title: Tawassul to Ahlulbayt (as)
duas.description:
Another thing which a prudent wayfarer should not forget during the first night of this holy month is resorting(tawassul) to the impeccable ones (Ma'sumin)[33] in that night.
It is up to him to stretch his hand sincerely towards the threshold of those exalted saintly personalities, should present their blessed, glorious, and beautiful faces as intercessors for our unblessed and polluted (with sins), faces, thus, looking towards the Lord through their splendour and magnanimity because, it is not appropriate and desirable to look towards Him directly with a face blackened with sins, and cheeks rusted with transgressions. Instead, he should plead with them, should open his tongue full of grief and anxiety, should request them to act as intercessors for pleading his case.
It might be that their hearts would become soft with love for him, with their greatness they might accept him by acting as his intercessors as well as might request Allah (the Glorious, the Exalted), that may He accept him and bestow upon him the grace and favour so that he would become the way his Lord desires him to be. Because, Allah (the Glorious, the Exalted), being the most Compassionate and most Merciful, undoubtedly would accept the plea and intercession of those compassionate and exalted personalities, especially, those Sinless noble ones, to whom He himself has taught generosity and compassion as well as has allowed them to act as intercessors.
Yes! By resorting sincerely, truly and honestly to these noble exalted personalities one may attain such gains, prosperity, and salvation which can't even be attained through engaging in worship for one complete year. Therefore, it is up to us to make our best endeavours, by treating the time as our best available opportunity; we should extend our hands towards their threshold; by offering salutations and thanks should open our tongues for needs, and saying the following sincerely and honestly:

segments.arabic: أَنْتَ يَا سَيِّدِي فِي هَذِهِ اللَّيْلَةِ حَامِي الأُمَّةِ وَخَفِيرُهُمْ ،.
segments.transliteration: anta yā sayyidī fī hadhihi l-laylati ḥāmi l-ummati wa khafīruhum ,.
segments.translation: O' my masters! Tonight you are the support and shelter of everyone,

segments.arabic: وَأَكْرَمُ الْخَلَائِقِ ، تُحِبُّ الضِّيَافَةَ وَمَأْمُورٌ مِنَ اللَّهِ جَلَّ جَلَالُهُ بِالْإِجَارَةِ ، عَبْدُكَ ضَيْفُ اللَّهِ وَضَيْفُكَ ، وَجَارُ اللَّهِ وَجَارُكَ فَأَجِرْ عَبْدَكَ وَأَضِفْهُ ،.
segments.transliteration: wa akramu l-khalā'iqi , tuḥibbu ḍ-ḍwiyāfata wa māmūrun mina l-lahi jalla jalāluhu bi l-ijārati , ʿabduka ḍayfu l-lahi wa ḍayfuka , wa jāru l-lahi wa jāruka fa ajir ʿabdaka wa aḍifhu ,.
segments.translation: you are the most exalted and generous among all exalted and generous ones, you like inviting guests and want to be generous towards them;Also Allah (the Glorious, the Exalted), has commanded you to provide refuge and shelter forthe wretched and unsheltered people;now here is one of the Allah's unsheltered servants who has came to attend your as well as Allah's feast; has attached his heart upon your support and well as Allah's support and hospitality;be hospitable and allow him to sit upon the table of your generosity and treat him in the following manner:

segments.arabic: وَاجْعَلْ قِرَايَ مِنْكَ اللَّيْلَةَ أَنْ تُدْخِلَنِي فِي هَمِّكَ وَحِزْبِكَ ، وَدُعَائِكَ وَحِمَايَتِكَ ، وَشَفَاعَتِكَ وَوِلَايَتِكَ وَشِيعَتِكَ ..
segments.transliteration: wajʿal qirāya minka l-laylata an tudkhilanī fī hammika wa ḥizbikā , wa duʿā'ika wa ḥimāyatika , wa shafāʿatika wa wilāyatika wa shīʿatika ..
segments.translation: Consider him as your friend and supporter and do not deprive me from your best support and endeavours; do not deprive him from your prayer, backing, and intercession

segments.arabic: وَارْغَبْ إِلَى اللَّهِ لِي فِي كَرَمِ عَفْوِهِ ، وَقَبُولِهِ ، وَرِضَاهُ ،.
segments.transliteration: warghab ila l-lahi lī fī karami ʿafwihi , wa qabūlihi , wa riḍāhu ,.
segments.translation: ;ask Allah (the Glorious, the Exalted), not to deprive me from His Forgiveness and Benevolence; His mercy and compassion;

segments.arabic: وَأَنْ يَنْظُرَ إِلَيَّ نَظْرَةً رَحِيمَةً بِهَا عَنِّي رِضًا لَا سَخَطَ عَلَيَّ بَعْدَهُ أَبَدًا ، وَيُلْحِقُنِي بِشِيعَتِكُمُ الْمُقَرَّبِينَ ، وَأَوْلِيَائِكُمُ السَّابِقِينَ ، فَإِنَّهُ لَا يَرُدُّ شَفَاعَتَكَ ، فَإِنَّ لَكَ عِنْدَ اللَّهِ شَأْنًا مِنَ الشَّأْنِ ، وَقَدْرًا مِنَ الْقَدْرِ ، فَبِحَقِّ هَذَا الشَّأْنِ الَّذِي جَعَلَ اللَّهُ لَكَ.
segments.transliteration: wa an yanẓura ilayya naẓratan raḥīmatan biha ʿannī riḍan lā sakhaṭa ʿalayya baʿdahu abadan , wa yulḥiqunī bi shīʿatikumu l-muqarrabīna , wa awliyā'ikumu s-sābiqīna , fa innahu lā yaruddu shafāʿataka , fa inna laka ʿinda l-lahi shānan mina sh-shāni , wa qadran mina l-qadri , fabiḥaqwi hadha sh-shāni l-ladhī jaʿala l-lahu laka.
segments.translation: then look at him with love and pleasure;becoming so happy and pleased with him that after that He should never become unhappy and angry with him, should regard him as His sincere friend and worthy servant....

segments.arabic: يَا مَوْلَايَ أَسْأَلُكَ أَنْ تَسْمَحَ فِي حَقِّي بِمَا سَأَلْتُكَ ،
segments.transliteration: yā mawlāya asaluka an tasmaḥa fī ḥaqī bi mā sāltuka ,
segments.translation: I ask you by your splendour and majesty,which Allah (the Glorious, the Exalted), has bestowed upon you,
reward me more than whatever I have asked in accordance with your generosity;

segments.arabic: وَلَا تَنْظُرْ يَا سَيِّدِي إِلَى حَقَارَتِي وَذُلَّ مَقَامِي وَسُوءَ حَالِي ،
segments.transliteration: wa lā tanẓur yā sayyidī ila ḥaqāratī wa dhulla maqāmī wa sū'a ḥālī ,
segments.translation: don't look upon my worthlessness, disobedience, and deviations,

segments.arabic: فَإِنَّ الْكِرَامَ لَا يَعْظُمُ عَلَيْهِمْ فِي قِرَى ضَيْفِهِمْ شَيْءٌ مِنَ الْعَطَايَا ،
segments.transliteration: fa inna l-kirāma lā yaʿẓumu ʿalayhim fī qira ḍayfihim shay'un mina l-ʿaṭāyā
segments.translation: because the generosity of the generous ones and the hospitality shown by the exalted ones are in accordance with their generosity and exaltedness

segments.arabic: وَلَا يُقَدِّرُونَ كَرَامَتَهُمْ وَعَطَايَاهُمْ بِقَدْرِ الضُّيُوفِ السَّائِلِينَ ،
segments.transliteration: wa lā yuqaddirūna karāmatahum wa ʿaṭāyāhum bi qadri ḍ-ḍuyūfi s-sā'ilīna ,
segments.translation: and not in proportion with the worth and merit of their requester.

segments.arabic: فَإِنَّ الْعَطَاءَ بِقَدْرِ الْمُعْطِي ، وَالْقِرَى بِقَدْرِ الْمُضِيفِ..
segments.transliteration: fa inna l-ʿaṭā'a bi qadri l-muʿṭī , wa l-qira bi qadri l-muḍīfi..
segments.translation: You reward in proportion with the giver and not on the worth and merit of their recipients

segments.arabic: سَادَتِي أَنْتُمُ الَّذِينَ عَلَّمْتُمُ الْكِرَامَ آدَابَ الْكَرَامَةِ ، وَالْأَجْوَادُ شِيمُ الْجُودِ وَالسَّمَاحَةِ ، إِنْ ذُكِرَ الْجُودُ كُنْتُمْ أَوَّلَهُ وَآخِرَهُ ، وَأَصْلَهُ وَفَرْعَهُ وَمُنْتَهَاهُ ، وَإِنْ قِيلَ الْكَرَمُ فَأَنْتُمْ مَعْدِنُهُ وَمَأْوَاهُ لَا يَرُدُّ سَائِلَكُمْ وَلَا يَخِيبُ آمِلَكُمْ ..
segments.transliteration: sādatī antumu l-ladhīna ʿallamtumu l-kirāma adāba l-karāmati , wa l-ajjadu shīmu l-jūdi wa s-samāḥati , in dhukira l-jūdu kuntum awwalahu wa akhirahu , wa aṣlahu wa farʿahu wa muntahāhu , wa in qīla l-karamu fa antum maʿdinuhu wa māwahu lā yaruddu sā'ilakum wa lā yakhību amilakum ..
segments.translation: O' my masters! You are the ones who have taught greatness to the exalted ones, generosity to the generous ones, and benevolence to the benevolent ones;

segments.arabic: سَادَتِي أَنْتُمُ الَّذِينَ قُلْتُمْ : مَثَلُ الْمَعْرُوفِ مَثَلُ الْمَطَرِ ، يُصِيبُ الْبَرَّ وَالْفَاجِرَ ، فَلَا تَمْنَعُونِي سَحَائِبَ رَأفَتِكُمْ ، فَلْيُصِبْنِي أَمْطَارُ جُودِكُمْ ، فَإِنِّي مِنْ جُودِكُمْ جَائِعٌ ، وَمِنْ كَرَمِكُمْ ظَمْآنٌ ، لَا تَرْضُوا لِضَيْفِكُمْ أَنْ يَبِيتَ فِي حِمَاكُمْ جَائِعًا ضَمْآنًا..
segments.transliteration: sādatī antumu l-ladhīna qultum : mathalu l-maʿrūfi mathalu l-maṭari , yuṣību l-barra wa l-fājira , fa lā tamnaʿūnī saḥā'iba ra'afatikum , falyuṣibnī amṭāru jūdikum , fa'innī min jūdikum jā'iʿun , wa min karamikum ẓamānun , lā tarḍū li ḍayfikum an yabīta fī ḥimākum jā'iʿan ḍamānan..
segments.translation: as you yourself have proclaimed:"Your generosity and reward like rain water pour upon the righteous ones as well as upon the bad ones, likewise;" saturate me with the rain of your generosity, do not deprive me from the rain of your generosity, do not deprive me from the pouring of your love because I am thirsty for your generosity and hungry for your love and affection;you don't like that your guests who have taken shelter in your threshold and have tied their hopes upon your benevolence should remain thirsty and hungry.

segments.arabic: فَأَنْتَ يَا مَوْلَايَ مَتَى مَا مَنَعْتَنِي قِرَاكَ ، بِتُّ طَاوِيًا فِي حِمَاكَ ، وَوَصَلْتُ إِلَى الْهَلَاكِ ، حَاشَاكَ مِنْ هَذِهِ الْمُعَامَلَةِ مَعَ ضَيْفِكَ ثُمَّ حَاشَاكَ ..
segments.transliteration: fa anta yā mawlāya mata mā manaʿtanī qirāka , bi tu ṭāwiyan fī ḥimāka , wa wa ṣaltu ila l-halāki , ḥāshāka min hadhihi l-muʿāmalati maʿa ḍayfika thumma ḥāshāka ..
segments.translation: O' my masters! If you will deprive me from your hospitality I will die with hunger under your shelter sitting upon the side of your tablecloth.

buttons.text: Long Dua from Iqbal Al Amaal
